DVXR — honest, presentation-ready results

Honesty note. Fusion does not beat strong baselines on any real task (negative RER). The BCI command result is demoted: it reproduces Emotiv's on-device Mental-Command state from raw EEG (exploratory, single-subject, single-session) — not validated neural-intent decoding. Every number traces to a file (see MANIFEST.md).
